# Docetaxel 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Docetaxel 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Docetaxel</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Docetaxel 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Breast cancer Taxotere in combination with doxorubicin and cyclophosphamide is indicated for the adjuvant treatment of patients with:  operable node-positive breast cancer; operable node-negative...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>female breast carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>Ewing sarcoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>well-differentiated fetal adenocarcinoma of the lung（99.8%）</li>
<li>small cell lung carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>primary pulmonary lymphoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（99.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary blastoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（99.8%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>hereditary breast ovarian cancer syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>liver sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>synovial chondromatosis（99.7%）</li>
<li>orbit sarcoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>giant cell tumor of soft tissue（99.6%）</li>
<li>sarcoma, avian（99.6%）</li>
<li>lung mixed small cell and squamous cell carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/docetaxel/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
